title: NetApp ONTAP Volume
description: Schema for a NetApp ONTAP storage volume. A volume is a logical container for data within a storage virtual machine (SVM), provisioned from an aggregate (local tier). Volumes support NAS (NFS/CIFS) and SAN (iSCSI/FCP) protocols and provide features such as snapshots, cloning, tiering, encryption, and quality of service.

uuid.description: Unique identifier for the volume, assigned by ONTAP upon creation

name.description: Volume name, unique within the SVM. Must begin with a letter or underscore and contain only letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

type.description: Volume type: rw (read-write, default), dp (data-protection for SnapMirror destinations), ls (load-sharing mirror)

state.description: Current operational state of the volume

style.description: Volume style indicating the underlying architecture

size.description: Total provisioned size of the volume in bytes

comment.description: Optional comment or description for the volume

language.description: Language encoding setting for the volume, controlling character set and case-folding behavior

create_time.description: Timestamp when the volume was created

svm.description: Storage virtual machine (SVM) that owns the volume

aggregates.description: Aggregates hosting the volume. A FlexVol volume resides on a single aggregate; a FlexGroup volume can span multiple aggregates.

space.description: Space utilization and configuration for the volume

nas.description: NAS-specific configuration including junction path, security style, and export policy

guarantee.description: Space guarantee configuration determining how space is reserved

snapshot_policy.description: Snapshot policy governing automatic snapshot creation and retention

qos.description: Quality of service settings controlling throughput and IOPS limits

tiering.description: FabricPool tiering policy controlling data movement to cloud storage

autosize.description: Volume autosize settings for automatic grow and shrink behavior

clone.description: Clone information if this volume is a FlexClone

SvmReference.description: Reference to a storage virtual machine (SVM)

AggregateReference.description: Reference to a storage aggregate (local tier)

VolumeSpace.description: Space utilization and configuration for a volume

logical_space.description: Logical space accounting (reflects storage efficiency savings)

reporting.description: Whether logical space reporting is enabled

enforcement.description: Whether logical space enforcement is enabled

snapshot.description: Space reserved and consumed by Snapshot copies

reserve_percent.description: Percentage of volume capacity reserved for snapshots (0-100)

used.description: Space consumed by snapshots in bytes

over_provisioned.description: Amount of over-provisioned space in bytes

NasProperties.description: NAS protocol configuration for the volume

path.description: Junction path where the volume is mounted in the SVM namespace. Must start with /. Set to null to unmount.

security_style.description: Security style of the volume root directory, determining how file permissions are evaluated

unix_permissions.description: UNIX permissions on the volume root in octal format

export_policy.description: NFS export policy controlling client access

SpaceGuarantee.description: Space guarantee configuration for the volume

type.description: Type of space guarantee. 'volume' reserves the full volume size on the aggregate; 'none' uses thin provisioning.

honored.description: Whether the guarantee is currently being honored

QosConfiguration.description: Quality of service configuration for the volume

max_throughput_iops.description: Maximum throughput in I/O operations per second

max_throughput_mbps.description: Maximum throughput in megabytes per second

min_throughput_iops.description: Minimum guaranteed throughput in IOPS (adaptive QoS)

min_throughput_mbps.description: Minimum guaranteed throughput in MB/s (adaptive QoS)

TieringPolicy.description: FabricPool tiering configuration controlling data movement between performance and capacity tiers

policy.description: Tiering policy: 'none' keeps all data on the performance tier, 'snapshot_only' tiers snapshot data, 'auto' tiers cold data, 'all' tiers all data, 'backup' is for SnapMirror destinations.

min_cooling_days.description: Minimum number of days data blocks must be inactive before they are eligible for tiering to the cloud tier

enabled.description: Whether NetApp Volume Encryption (NVE) is enabled on this volume

type.description: Encryption type applied to the volume

AutosizeConfiguration.description: Volume autosize configuration for automatic space management

mode.description: Autosize operating mode: 'off' disables autosize, 'grow' allows automatic growth, 'grow_shrink' allows both growth and shrinkage.

grow_threshold.description: Percentage of used space that triggers automatic growth

shrink_threshold.description: Percentage of used space below which automatic shrinkage occurs

maximum.description: Maximum size the volume can grow to in bytes

minimum.description: Minimum size the volume can shrink to in bytes

is_flexclone.description: Whether this volume is a FlexClone volume

parent_volume.description: Parent volume from which this clone was created

parent_snapshot.description: Parent snapshot from which this clone was created

split_initiated.description: Whether a clone split operation has been initiated to separate this clone from its parent

SelfLink.description: HAL-style self link for the resource
